Patch Set 3: Commit message was updated.

Patch Set 3: Code-Review+1

The test_84 failed each time, but not because of an object allocation issue, rather because a client was not evicted as it should have been on the 11th run in a row.

I suspect this might be a bug or race in the test when run in a loop, so I'll be content if it passes ten times in a row.

Looks good to me.

parents.subject: LU-16427 lfs: rmfid does not print anything on error

commit.subject: LU-14692 tests: wait for osp in conf-sanity/84
commit.message:
LU-14692 tests: wait for osp in conf-sanity/84

Wait for osp to change the first IDIF SEQ to a
normal SEQ, before using replay_barrier.
Otherwise the SEQ change could get lost and we
will trigger LASSERT during replay.

Change-Id: I32daa49d6329902b84eebb00090ae3cebe4a71b0
Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=conf-sanity env=ONLY=84,ONLY_REPEAT=10
Signed-off-by: Li Dongyang <dongyangli@ddn.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/50477
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
